A

aboutItem - Variable in class qtouch.QTouchView
Menu items: New Game, Save Game, and About dialog.

B

boardLabel - Variable in class qtouch.QTouchView
Main board image updated by the controller as the game progresses.
buildSaveString() - Method in class qtouch.QTouchController
Builds and returns a complete save string representing the entire current game state, including positions, cards, scores, timers, portraits, and used cards.

C

centerCard - Variable in class qtouch.QTouchView
Center card area (if used in design).
currentPlayerLabel - Variable in class qtouch.QTouchView
Displays current player, remaining time, dice value, and draw pile info.

D

diceLabel - Variable in class qtouch.QTouchView
Displays current player, remaining time, dice value, and draw pile info.
drawCardLabel1 - Variable in class qtouch.QTouchView
Displays current player, remaining time, dice value, and draw pile info.
drawCardLabel2 - Variable in class qtouch.QTouchView
Displays current player, remaining time, dice value, and draw pile info.

E

exitItem - Variable in class qtouch.QTouchView
Menu item used to exit the game window.

G

getCurrentPosition() - Method in class qtouch.QTouchModel
 
getRemainingCards() - Method in class qtouch.QTouchModel
 
getSavedGameConfig() - Method in class qtouch.QTouchModel
Returns the serialized saved game configuration string.
getTimeLeft() - Method in class qtouch.QTouchModel
 

I

IMAGE_PATH - Static variable in class qtouch.QTouchModel
Path to the game's image resources.
initialize() - Method in class qtouch.QTouchController
Initializes the controller, sets listeners, restores saved games, loads resources, and prepares the game to start.
isGameStarted() - Method in class qtouch.QTouchModel
 
isPaused() - Method in class qtouch.QTouchModel
 
isPlayer1Turn() - Method in class qtouch.QTouchModel
 

L

leftPanel - Variable in class qtouch.QTouchView
Left player's panel (cards, image, score).
loadScaledImage(String, int, int) - Method in class qtouch.QTouchView
Loads and scales an image to the specified size.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class qtouch.QTouchMVC
Entry point for launching the QTouch game.

N

newGameItem - Variable in class qtouch.QTouchView
Menu items: New Game, Save Game, and About dialog.

P

pauseIcon - Variable in class qtouch.QTouchView
Icons for the Start and Pause buttons.
player1Score - Variable in class qtouch.QTouchView
Labels showing touchdown scores for both players.
player1Title - Variable in class qtouch.QTouchView
Labels showing the names of Player 1 and Player 2.
player2Score - Variable in class qtouch.QTouchView
Labels showing touchdown scores for both players.
player2Title - Variable in class qtouch.QTouchView
Labels showing the names of Player 1 and Player 2.

Q

qtouch - package qtouch
 
QTouchController - Class in qtouch
Controller class for the QTouch game.
QTouchController(QTouchModel, QTouchView) - Constructor for class qtouch.QTouchController
Creates a QTouchController with the given model and view.
QTouchException - Exception in qtouch
Custom exception class for QTouch game errors.
QTouchException(String) - Constructor for exception qtouch.QTouchException
Creates a new QTouchException with the specified message.
QTouchModel - Class in qtouch
Model class â€“ holds all constants, variables, and game states.
QTouchModel() - Constructor for class qtouch.QTouchModel
 
QTouchMVC - Class in qtouch
Entry point for QTouch MVC.
QTouchMVC() - Constructor for class qtouch.QTouchMVC
 
QTouchSplash - Class in qtouch
Splash screen for QTouch game (3 seconds).
QTouchSplash(QTouchModel) - Constructor for class qtouch.QTouchSplash
Creates the QTouch splash screen and builds its UI.
QTouchView - Class in qtouch
View â€“ handles the full GUI layout and menus.
QTouchView(QTouchModel) - Constructor for class qtouch.QTouchView
Builds the complete QTouch GUI (menus, layout, board, player panels).

R

rightPanel - Variable in class qtouch.QTouchView
Left player's panel (cards, image, score).
rollButton - Variable in class qtouch.QTouchView
Buttons for rolling dice and starting/pausing the game.

S

saveGameItem - Variable in class qtouch.QTouchView
Menu items: New Game, Save Game, and About dialog.
setCurrentPosition(String) - Method in class qtouch.QTouchModel
Sets the current board position.
setGameStarted(boolean) - Method in class qtouch.QTouchModel
Sets whether the game has started.
setPaused(boolean) - Method in class qtouch.QTouchModel
Sets whether the game is paused.
setPlayer1Turn(boolean) - Method in class qtouch.QTouchModel
Sets the active player's turn.
setRemainingCards(int) - Method in class qtouch.QTouchModel
Sets the number of cards remaining in the deck.
setSaveCallback(Consumer<String>) - Method in class qtouch.QTouchController
Sets a callback that receives the save string whenever a save operation occurs.
setSavedGameConfig(String) - Method in class qtouch.QTouchModel
Stores the serialized saved game configuration.
setTimeLeft(int) - Method in class qtouch.QTouchModel
Sets the countdown timer for the turn.
showSplash() - Method in class qtouch.QTouchSplash
Displays the splash screen for 3 seconds, then hides it.
startIcon - Variable in class qtouch.QTouchView
Icons for the Start and Pause buttons.
startPauseButton - Variable in class qtouch.QTouchView
Buttons for rolling dice and starting/pausing the game.
switchTurn() - Method in class qtouch.QTouchModel
Switches the active player turn.

T

timeLabel - Variable in class qtouch.QTouchView
Displays current player, remaining time, dice value, and draw pile info.
turnTimer - Variable in class qtouch.QTouchView
Swing timer for countdown per turn.
